caption: A man is seated in a podcast studio, wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK" printed on it, a black baseball cap with an ornate gold emblem, and over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional studio microphone. In the background, white walls are adorned with gold stars and the words "GRIND" and "HUSTLE." To his right, a screen displays "BOSS TALK 101" in red and white lettering. On-screen graphics include a circular logo on the left that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and a text overlay on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101." As the sequence progresses, the man speaks into the microphone, shifting his head slightly and moving his right hand. In the final moments, he raises his hand toward his face, gesturing with his fingers as he continues to talk.
